creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to vsjcfm from comment #4)
> (In reply to Raphael Kubo da Costa from comment #3)
> > What do you mean by this change of state to Timeout/Feedback Timeout? This
> > is normally used the other way around, so I can't see what outcome you
> > expect here.
> 
> AFAIK, submitter or maintainer must answer to corresponding PR in a two
> weeks (correct me if there were any changes). I didn't receive any answer
> for more than six months, so I think that maintainer timeout was hit.

The two weeks period is for patches: http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/makefile-maintainer.html

In this case, changing the state has no effect as there's no proposed patch to be committed.

Resetting to "In Discussion".
